query:
-- Preview: SasBoss services matched to workbook line items by customer + product name
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyRevenue AS current_revenue,
  swl.amountExGst AS workbook_revenue,
  swl.productName AS workbook_product,
  swu.supplier,
  swu.billingMonth
FROM services s
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swu.supplier = 'SasBoss'
JOIN supplier_workbook_line_items swl ON swl.uploadId = swu.id
  AND swl.matchedCustomerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
  AND LOWER(swl.productName) = LOWER(s.planName)
WHERE LOWER(s.billingPlatform) LIKE '%sasboss%'
ORDER BY swu.billingMonth DESC, s.customerExternalId, s.planName
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Preview: SasBoss services matched to workbook line items by customer + product name
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyRevenue AS current_revenue,
  swl.amountExGst AS workbook_revenue,
  swl.productName AS workbook_product,
  swu.supplier,
  swu.billingMonth
FROM services s
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swu.supplier = 'SasBoss'
JOIN supplier_workbook_line_items swl ON swl.uploadId = swu.id
  AND swl.matchedCustomerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
  AND LOWER(swl.productName) = LOWER(s.planName)
WHERE LOWER(s.billingPlatform) LIKE '%sasboss%'
ORDER BY swu.billingMonth DESC, s.customerExternalId, s.planName
LIMIT 20;
